description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a dark gray gable roof and a combination of horizontal and vertical siding in a muted gray color. The front facade features a double garage with white doors, a covered porch with white railings, and a central entryway flanked by windows with brown shutters. The house has multiple rectangular windows arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, and a prominent chimney rises from the roof. The rear of the house includes a patio area and additional large windows, while the sides are simpler with fewer windows. The property is set on a rectangular green lawn with a concrete driveway and walkway leading to the main entrance.
description: A two-story suburban house with a dark gray gable roof, white-trimmed windows, a double garage, and a covered front porch, set on a green lawn with a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entry porch with white railings, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the covered porch, steps leading to the entryway, and the depth of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large windows, a patio area, and the chimney, with fewer decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a simpler facade with minimal windows and the driveway extending to the back.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with some asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Central covered porch with white railings, steps, and a single main door flanked by windows
